& v/;{k ^^ Hkkjr ds jk"Vªifr ds vkns'k ls vkSj muds uke esaA [Qk- la- 1@1@2012&cs-iz-] vkyksd jkor] lfpo ¼ty lalk/ku½ ikn fVIi.k %& ikn fVIi.k %& ikn fVIi.k %& ikn fVIi.k %& ewy vf/klwpuk Hkkjr ds jkti=k esa la[;kad dk-vk- 437¼v½] rkjh[k 2 twu] 1990 }kjk izdkf'kr dh xbZ Fkh vkSj la[;kad dk-vk- 862¼v½+] rkjh[k 11 fnlacj] 1996 }kjk mlesa i'pkr~orhZ la'kks/ku fd;k x;k A -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th May, 2014 S.O. 1271(E).—In exercise of the power conferred by sub-section (2) of Section 4, read with Section 5A of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Government hereby appoints the following person as Chairman of the Cauvery Water Dispute Tribunal, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, and for this purpose, make the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources vide number S.O. 437(E), dated the 2nd June, 1990 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 11th December, 1996, namely :— In the said notification, for serial number (i) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely :— “(i) Dr. Justice Balbir Singh Chauhan Judge of the Supreme Court — Chairman” By Order and in the Name of the President of India. [ F. No. 1/1/2012-BM] ALOK RAWAT, Secy. (Water Resources) Foot Note:—The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide Number S.O. 437(E), dated the 2nd June, 1990 and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 862(E), dated the 11th December, 1996. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
